name: factura-ya
description: Factura Ya — Invoice factoring marketplace on Cardano

scripts.install:all: cd contracts && aiken build && cd ../offchain && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../indexer && npm install
scripts.dev:
echo 'Run in separate terminals:
  npm run server    → tx server on :3002
  npm run frontend  → UI on :5173
  npm run indexer   → API on :3001 (optional)'
